title: flindersia bennettii
intro: Flindersia bennettii, a species of plant native to Australia, is a flowering tree within the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Flindersia bennettii are said to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea form or as an essential oil, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
